zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Woodnoth是John Woodnoth的女兒，於1429年出生在英國英格蘭爾切斯特布拉可。她於大約1441年與Sir Richard Maston Moreton在英國爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1460年在她的家鄉享年31歲。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Woodnoth was born in 1429, in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of John Woodnoth. She married Sir Richard Maston Moreton about 1441, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1460, in her hometown, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Woodnoth est née en 1429, à Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de John Woodnoth. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Maston Moreton environ 1441, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1460, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Woodnoth wurde 1429 in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von John Woodnoth geboren. Sie hat um 1441 in Cheshire, England Sir Richard Maston Moreton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1460 im Alter von 31 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Woodnothは1429年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターブラコンでJohn Woodnothの娘として生まれた。約1441年にイギリスチェシュアイアでSir Richard Maston Moretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1460年に故郷で31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Woodnoth(은)는 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 블라콘에서 John Woodnoth의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1441년 영국 체실르에서 Sir Richard Maston Moreton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 그녀의 고향에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Woodnoth родилась в 1429 г. в местности блакон, честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали John Woodnoth. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Maston Moreton около 1441 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1460 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 31 год.
